description:
Recto: memorial list for the family of the Nagid Shemuʾel b. Hananya ha-Nagid: 
- Shemarya ha-Shishi
- Shemarya's three sons: Ṣedaqa, Seʿadʾel, and Ḥananya
- Ḥananya's two sons: Avraham and Shemuʾel (the Nagid)
- Shemuʾel's two sons: Yaḥyā who died young, and Ḥananya
- Ḥananya's son Shemuʾel (known as "grandson of Nagids")

Verso continues with other memorial lists, including for the family (ʿitra) of al-Rashīd Shemuʾel (ʿEli --> Ṣemaḥ --> Yefet), of Ibn ʿAmmār (ʿAmram --> Berakhot --> Yeshuʿa (and his son Elʿazar), ʿAmram, ʿEli, and Netanʾel); then a list of names including Shemuʾel, Yehoshuaʿ, and Ḥananya, and finally an invocation of the current Nagid Avraham Maimonides (הרב המבהוק(!)). NB: This was previously listed on PGP under the shelfmark HUC Geniza 3. AA/ASE
description_he: רשימת הנצחה למשפחת הנגיד שמואל בן חנניה, כולל אבות ובנים, ורשימות נוספות כולל הנגיד אברהם מיימוניד.
